cairo.sql.copy.export.root.description: Root directory for parquet exports via `COPY-TO` SQL. This path must not overlap with other directory (e.g. db, conf) of running instance, otherwise export may delete or overwrite existing files. Relative paths are resolved against the server root directory.

cairo.parquet.export.bloom.filter.fpp.description: Default bloom filter false positive probability (FPP) for Parquet exports via `COPY-TO` and REST `/exp`. Lower values produce larger but more accurate filters. Range: 0.0 to 1.0.

cairo.parquet.export.statistics.enabled.description: Enables or disables generation of column statistics (min/max, null count) in Parquet exports.
